de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy

Class JavaCardDLStrategyFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.JavaCardDLStrategyFactory

    Named, StrategyFactory

extends Object
implements StrategyFactory

      • create

        public Strategy create(Proof p_proof,
              StrategyProperties strategyProperties)
        Description copied from interface: StrategyFactory
        Create strategy for a proof.
        Specified by:
        create in interface StrategyFactory
        Parameters:
        p_proof - the Proof a strategy is created for
        strategyProperties - the StrategyProperties to customize the strategy
        Returns:
        the newly created strategy
